languages.text: {n}Множество эмоций сменяется на лице Ведки за мгновение, но она быстро берет себя в руки.{/n} "За время перелета я ознакомилась с Уставом Астра Милитарум из корабельной библиотеки, Ваша Светлость. Он... он сильно отличается от того, который хранился на Заркове. За века переписывания мы многое невольно изменили. Это многих расстроило, но в остальном мы в порядке, Лорд-капитан".

{n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarised myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Множество эмоций сменяется на лице Ведки за мгновение, но она быстро берет себя в руки.{/n} "За время перелета я ознакомилась с Уставом Астра Милитарум из корабельной библиотеки, Ваша Светлость. Он... он сильно отличается от того, который хранился на Заркове. За века переписывания мы многое невольно изменили. Это многих расстроило, но в остальном мы в порядке, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she pulls herself together.{/n} "During the journey I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Code I found at the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Code on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

{n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Code I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Code on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

"Things have already improved, Lord Captain. Morale is high and the initial shock has worn off. There is still so much to learn, but we've got used to the ship's air and the peculiar accents and dialects of the rest of the crew."

{n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she pulls herself together.{/n} "During the journey I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Code I found at the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Code on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

{n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Code I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Code on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「状況はすでに改善しています、艦長。士気は高く、最初の衝撃も去りました。まだ学ぶべきことはたくさんありますが、船の空気や他の乗組員の独特のアクセントや方言に慣れました」
languages.original_text: "Things have already improved, Lord Captain. Morale is high and the initial shock has worn off. There is still so much to learn, but we've got used to the ship's air and the peculiar accents and dialects of the rest of the crew."

languages.text: {n}Kendini toparlamadan önce Vedka'nın yüzünde bir duygu kasırgası belirip kayboluyor.{/n} "Yolculuk sırasında geminin kütüphanesinde bulduğum Astra Militarum El Kitabı'nı inceledim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bu... Zarkov'daki El Kitabı'ndan oldukça farklı. Yüzyıllarca süren kopyalama işlemleri boyunca farkında olmadan o kadar çok şeyi değiştirmişiz ki. Bu durum pek çoğumuzu huzursuz etti ama bunun dışında iyiyiz Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kendini toparlamadan önce Vedka'nın yüzünde bir duygu kasırgası belirip kayboluyor.{/n} "Yolculuk sırasında geminin kütüphanesinde bulduğum Astra Militarum El Kitabı'nı inceledim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bu... Zarkov'daki El Kitabı'ndan oldukça farklı. Yüzyıllarca süren kopyalama işlemleri boyunca farkında olmadan o kadar çok şeyi değiştirmişiz ki. Bu durum pek çoğumuzu huzursuz etti ama bunun dışında iyiyiz Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: {n}一阵情绪在薇德卡脸上闪过，但她很快便稳住了自己。{/n}“在航程中，我研读了舰船图书馆里的《星界军手册》，大人。它……与扎尔科夫的那本差异极大。数个世纪的传抄让我们在无意间改动了不少内容。这让许多人感到不安，但除此之外，我们一切都好，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}一阵情绪在薇德卡脸上闪过，但她很快便稳住了自己。{/n}“在航程中，我研读了舰船图书馆里的《星界军手册》，大人。它……与扎尔科夫的那本差异极大。数个世纪的传抄让我们在无意间改动了不少内容。这让许多人感到不安，但除此之外，我们一切都好，舰长大人。”

languages.text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment fegt ein Wirbelwind aus Emotionen über Vedkas Gesicht.{/n} "Ich habe mich während der Reise mit dem Handbuch des Astra Militarum vertraut gemacht, das ich in der Bibliothek des Schiffs gefunden habe, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Es ist ... Es ist völlig anders als das Handbuch auf Zarkov. Wir haben im Laufe der Jahrhunderte unwissentlich so viel verändert. Das hat viele von uns beunruhigt, aber ansonsten geht es uns gut, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment fegt ein Wirbelwind aus Emotionen über Vedkas Gesicht.{/n} "Ich habe mich während der Reise mit dem Handbuch des Astra Militarum vertraut gemacht, das ich in der Bibliothek des Schiffs gefunden habe, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Es ist ... Es ist völlig anders als das Handbuch auf Zarkov. Wir haben im Laufe der Jahrhunderte unwissentlich so viel verändert. Das hat viele von uns beunruhigt, aber ansonsten geht es uns gut, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}Plusieurs émotions traversent le visage de Vedka, puis elle se ressaisit.{/n} « J'ai trouvé le Code de l'Astra Militarum dans la bibliothèque. Pendant le voyage, je m'y suis familiarisée, Votre Seigneurie. Il est... très différent du Manuel de Zarkov. Malgré nos siècles de copie, nous avons beaucoup changé sans le vouloir. Cela en a perturbé plus d'un, mais sinon, tout va bien, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Plusieurs émotions traversent le visage de Vedka, puis elle se ressaisit.{/n} « J'ai trouvé le Code de l'Astra Militarum dans la bibliothèque. Pendant le voyage, je m'y suis familiarisée, Votre Seigneurie. Il est... très différent du Manuel de Zarkov. Malgré nos siècles de copie, nous avons beaucoup changé sans le vouloir. Cela en a perturbé plus d'un, mais sinon, tout va bien, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: {n}Un torbellino de emociones recorre el rostro de Vedka durante un momento, pero no tarda en recomponerse.{/n} «Durante el viaje, me familiaricé con el manual del Astra Militarum que encontré en la biblioteca de la nave, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es... es muy distinto al manual de Zarkov. Después de siglos de copias, hemos cambiado mucho sin saberlo. Esto ha inquietado a muchos, pero, por lo demás, estamos bien, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}A whirlwind of emotions flickers across Vedka's face for a moment before she composes herself.{/n} "During the journey, I familiarized myself with the Astra Militarum Handbook I found in the ship's library, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's... It's significantly different from the Handbook on Zarkov. Over centuries of copying, we have unwittingly changed so much. It has unsettled many, but otherwise, we are well, Lord Captain."

Es... es muy distinto al manual de Zarkov. Después de siglos de copias, hemos cambiado mucho sin saberlo. Esto ha inquietado a muchos, pero, por lo demás, estamos bien, Lord Capitán».
